(French pronunciation: [[le ʒaʁdɛ̃ də napjɛʁvil]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French"), "The Gardens of Napierville") is a [regional county municipality](/wiki/Regional_county_municipality "Regional county municipality") (RCM) in southwestern [Quebec](/wiki/Quebec "Quebec"), Canada, in the [Montérégie](/wiki/Mont%C3%A9r%C3%A9gie "Montérégie") region. Founded on January 1, 1982. Its seat is [Napierville](/wiki/Napierville "Napierville").

+ [A-15](/wiki/Quebec_Autoroute_15 "Quebec Autoroute 15") | * **Principal Highways**   + None | * **Secondary Highways**   + [R-202](/wiki/Quebec_Route_202 "Quebec Route 202")   + [R-205](/wiki/Quebec_Route_205 "Quebec Route 205")   + [R-209](/wiki/Quebec_Route_209 "Quebec Route 209")   + [R-217](/wiki/Quebec_Route_217 "Quebec Route 217")   + [R-219](/wiki/Quebec_Route_219 "Quebec Route 219")   + [R-221](/wiki/Quebec_Route_221 "Quebec Route 221") | * **External Routes**   + [I-87](/wiki/Interstate_87_(New_York) "Interstate 87 (New York)")   + [NY 22](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_22 "New York State Route 22") |

["*Banque de noms de lieux du Québec*: Reference number 141070"](https://toponymie.gouv.qc.ca/ct/ToposWeb/fiche.aspx?no_seq=141070). *toponymie.gouv.qc.ca* (in French). [Commission de toponymie du Québec](/wiki/Commission_de_toponymie_du_Qu%C3%A9bec "Commission de toponymie du Québec").

**Les Jardins-de-Napierville** (French pronunciation: [[le ʒaʁdɛ̃ də napjɛʁvil]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French"), "The Gardens of Napierville") is a [regional county municipality](/wiki/Regional_county_municipality "Regional county municipality") (RCM) in southwestern [Quebec](/wiki/Quebec "Quebec"), Canada, in the [Montérégie](/wiki/Mont%C3%A9r%C3%A9gie "Montérégie") region. Founded on January 1, 1982. Its seat is [Napierville](/wiki/Napierville "Napierville").

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Les_Jardins-de-Napierville_Regional_County_Municipality&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

The RCM was formed on January 1, 1982 by combining historic [Napierville County](/w/index.php?title=Napierville_County&action=edit&redlink=1 "Napierville County (page does not exist)") with other municipalities.

## Subdivisions

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Les_Jardins-de-Napierville_Regional_County_Municipality&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Subdivisions")]

There are 11 subdivisions within the RCM:[[2]](#cite_note-mamrot-2)

|  |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Cities & Towns (1)   * [Saint-Rémi](/wiki/Saint-R%C3%A9mi,_Quebec "Saint-Rémi, Quebec") | Municipalities (8)   * [Napierville](/wiki/Napierville,_Quebec "Napierville, Quebec") * [Saint-Bernard-de-Lacolle](/wiki/Saint-Bernard-de-Lacolle,_Quebec "Saint-Bernard-de-Lacolle, Quebec") * [Saint-Cyprien-de-Napierville](/wiki/Saint-Cyprien-de-Napierville,_Quebec "Saint-Cyprien-de-Napierville, Quebec") * [Saint-Édouard](/wiki/Saint-%C3%89douard,_Quebec "Saint-Édouard, Quebec") * [Saint-Jacques-le-Mineur](/wiki/Saint-Jacques-le-Mineur,_Quebec "Saint-Jacques-le-Mineur, Quebec") * [Saint-Michel](/wiki/Saint-Michel,_Quebec "Saint-Michel, Quebec") * [Saint-Patrice-de-Sherrington](/wiki/Saint-Patrice-de-Sherrington,_Quebec "Saint-Patrice-de-Sherrington, Quebec") * [Sainte-Clotilde](/wiki/Sainte-Clotilde,_Quebec "Sainte-Clotilde, Quebec") | Townships (1)   * [Hemmingford](/wiki/Hemmingford,_Quebec_(township) "Hemmingford, Quebec (township)") | Villages (1)   * [Hemmingford](/wiki/Hemmingford,_Quebec_(village) "Hemmingford, Quebec (village)") |
